seo.title: Building Agentic RAG with Flowise + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build agentic rag with Flowise + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: Flowise enables rapid development of Agentic RAG systems through its drag-and-drop interface, allowing multi-step retrieval agents that plan queries, fetch from multiple sources, and synthesize attributed responses. However, the complexity of autonomous query planning, multi-source retrieval, and agent handoffs introduces significant risks like hallucinations, poor source relevance, and context loss. Vex provides runtime verification to ensure source faithfulness, citation accuracy, and cross-source consistency in these high-risk pipelines.

architectureOverview.heading: Agentic RAG Architecture with Flowise
architectureOverview.description:
A typical Flowise Agentic RAG flow starts with a Query Planner Agent that decomposes user questions into sub-queries using an LLM node. These sub-queries feed into parallel Vector Store Tool nodes that retrieve from multiple sources (e.g., internal docs, web search, knowledge base). Retrieved chunks pass through a Relevance Reranker node, then a Synthesis Agent combines results with source attribution. The final Answer Generator produces cited responses while a Custom Tool node handles external API calls.

The flow uses Sequential and Parallel chains extensively, with agent handoffs between planning, retrieval, and synthesis stages. Context management happens via Memory Buffer nodes, but intermediate outputs often lack validation. Custom tools for web search or database queries frequently fail silently without error propagation to upstream agents.

Vex integrates as a callback handler that intercepts outputs at critical checkpoints: query plans, retrieved documents, tool responses, and final answers for comprehensive verification.

risks.name: Unvalidated Query Plans
risks.description: Planner agent generates irrelevant or malformed sub-queries that cascade poor retrieval results
risks.mitigation: Vex verifies query relevance and decomposition accuracy before retrieval

risks.name: Low-Relevance Document Retrieval
risks.description: Vector stores return semantically drifted chunks lacking query alignment
risks.mitigation: Vex scores document relevance and filters chunks below threshold

risks.name: Silent Tool Failures
risks.description: Custom tool nodes (web search, APIs) fail without propagating errors to synthesis agent
risks.mitigation: Vex monitors tool execution and injects fallback responses

risks.name: Context Loss in Agent Handoffs
risks.description: Sequential agent flows lose retrieval context between planning, retrieval, and synthesis
risks.mitigation: Vex persists and validates context across agent boundaries

implementation.title: Query Planner with Vex Validation
implementation.description: Add Vex callback to LLM Chain node to verify query decomposition produces relevant sub-queries

implementation.title: Vector Store Retrieval Guard
implementation.description: Intercept retrieval outputs to filter low-relevance documents before synthesis

implementation.title: Multi-Source Consistency Check
implementation.description: Verify synthesis agent maintains consistency across retrieved sources

implementation.title: Citation Verification Handler
implementation.description: Final check ensures all claims in answer trace back to verified sources

vexIntegration.title: Flowise Callback Registration
vexIntegration.description: Register Vex handlers in Flowise chatflow configuration for all critical nodes

vexIntegration.title: Custom Tool Node with Error Recovery
vexIntegration.description: Wrap custom tools with Vex monitoring and automatic fallback handling

vexIntegration.title: Session-Level Guardrail Dashboard
vexIntegration.description: Track verification metrics across entire Agentic RAG sessions

cta.heading: Secure Your Flowise Agentic RAG
cta.description: Deploy Vex guardrails today to eliminate hallucinations and ensure citation accuracy in production.
